zh.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼
zh.lifeSummary: 當Vaindemonde de Courtenay於1065年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼時，她的父親Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay31歲，母親Hildegarde de Gâtinais26歲。她於1095年與Renaud de Joigny結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1139年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vaindemonde de Courtenay于1065年出生在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼时，她的父亲Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay31岁，母亲Hildegarde de Gâtinais26岁。她于1095年与Renaud de Joigny结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1139年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾喬尼享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

en.lifeSummary: When Vaindemonde de Courtenay was born in 1065, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, her father, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, was 31 and her mother, Hildegarde de Gâtinais, was 26. She married Renaud de Joigny in 1095. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1139, in Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vaindemonde de Courtenay est née en 1065, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Hildegarde de Gâtinais, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud de Joigny en 1095. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1139, à Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Vaindemonde de Courtenay 1065 in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay 31 und ihre Mutter Hildegarde de Gâtinais 26. Sie hat 1095 Renaud de Joigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1139 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich.

Lei sposato Renaud de Joigny nel 1095. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1139, nel Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Vaindemonde de Courtenayが1065年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenayは31歳，母Hildegarde de Gâtinaisは26歳であった。1095年にRenaud de Joignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1139年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオンジョイグニーで75歳で死去した。

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Vaindemonde de Courtenay(이)가 1065년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hildegarde de Gâtinais(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1095년 Renaud de Joigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1139년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 조익니에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vaindemonde de Courtenay nasceu em 1065, em Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Hildegarde de Gâtinais, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud de Joigny em 1095. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1139, em Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 75 anos.

ru.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vaindemonde de Courtenay родилась в 1065 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Joscelin de Courtenay seigneur de Courtenay было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Hildegarde de Gâtinais, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud de Joigny в 1095 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1139 г. в местности джоигни, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Renaud de Joigny en 1095. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1139, en Joigny, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 75 años.
